description_long: This armchair features a boxy, modern silhouette with broad, straight armrests and a deep, plush seat. The upholstery is a solid, light beige fabric with a slightly velvety texture, showing some subtle wear and shading variations. The seat and back cushions are thick and removable, providing ample comfort and support. The backrest is medium height and straight, with a single large cushion for added softness. The base of the chair is slightly recessed and appears to be supported by short, dark feet that are only partially visible. Overall, the chair exudes a contemporary, utilitarian style suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A boxy, light beige upholstered armchair with broad padded armrests and thick removable cushions. The chair has a modern, utilitarian look with a slightly worn, velvety fabric finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the broad, straight armrest and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the straight backrest and the large, plush back cushion.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and seat depth, with visible cushion contours.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide seat, thick cushions, and the full width of the armrests.
attribute_backrest_style: medium height, straight, with a large removable cushion
attribute_leg_type: short, block-like, dark feet partially visible
